title: scoria alba
intro: Scoria alba, also known as White Scoria or White Coralwort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It is native to Europe, and its roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to their medicinal properties. The plant is rich in compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Scoria alba is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into creams and ointments to treat skin conditions.
